channel.title: Chroniq Now: Breaking Global News and Headlines Daily
channel.description: Chroniq Now - your trusted source for breaking global news, in-depth analysis and up-to-the-minute coverage of politics, business, culture and more.

item.title: NFL 2026 Schedule Out: Melbourne Opener and Patriots-Seahawks Lead
item.description:
The NFL has dropped its full 2026 season schedule, anchored by a groundbreaking Australia debut in Melbourne and a blockbuster Patriots-Seahawks Super Bowl rematch on opening weekend.

Key points:
• The Seattle Seahawks host the New England Patriots on Wednesday, Sept. 9 in a Super Bowl LX rematch — only the second time in 75 years the NFL has opened a season on a Wednesday.
• The LA Rams face the San Francisco 49ers in Melbourne, Australia on Sept. 10, marking the first-ever NFL regular-season game on Australian soil.
• The NFL will play a record nine international games in 2026 across four continents and seven countries, including stops in London, Paris, Rio de Janeiro, Mexico City, Germany, and Spain.
• The season features notable primetime highlights including a Chiefs-Bills Thanksgiving night matchup, a Cowboys-Eagles NFC East showdown on Monday Night Football in Week 7, and a highly anticipated Patriots-Chiefs game in Week 15 that would be the first career matchup between Drake Maye and Patrick Mahomes.

Read the full article: NFL 2026 Schedule Out: Melbourne Opener and Patriots-Seahawks Lead

item.title: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
item.description:
Driven Advisors and Administrative Services face scrutiny in a legal dispute with Bancrédito Holding Corp, owner of Bancrédito International Bank and Trust.

Read the full article: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
